hypothesis: Concept:** Applying *Finding 3 (Memory/Block Efficiency)* and *Finding 4 (State Management)*, we can mimic SIMD throughput within the restricted eBPF execution environment. By treating memory as a pre-fetched graph, we can use a "warm boot" scratchpad to eliminate dynamic allocation overhead and execute cache-oblivious block swaps aligned to the CPU's L1 cache lines (typically 64 bytes).
